steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The notation $f(3)$ means the input value is $3$. To find this function value, substitute $3$ for $x$ in the rule $f(x)=x^3+23$. That gives the expression $3^3+23$ to evaluate.

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content: Cube the input first, then add $23$. Since $3^3=27$, the function value is: $$f(3)=3^3+23=27+23=50$$ The answer is 50.
